title: Compliance: coap_client.c OSCORE
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.7. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_client.c. Status: VIOLATION. CoAP client sends unprotected payloads without OSCORE. Per §8.7 recommendation: Use OSCORE for all CoAP traffic. Needs integration with oscore/coap_oscore.c or mandatory OSCORE wrapper.
